name: Low-Calorie Turkey-Spinach Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Or 15 oz Jar spaghetti sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw the spinach and squeeze out any excess liquid.
2. Place about one-third of the spinach at the bottom of a lightly oiled casserole dish.
3. Spread half of the ricotta cheese evenly over the spinach.
4. Sprinkle half of the cooked turkey over the ricotta layer.
5. Spoon half of the spaghetti sauce over the turkey.
6. Top with half of the shredded mozzarella cheese.
7. Repeat steps 2-6 with one-third of the remaining spinach, the rest of the ricotta, turkey, spaghetti sauce, and mozzarella.
8. Finish with the final third of the spinach and sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
9. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 45 to 50 minutes, or until golden brown.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
